headline: LG’s glossy OLED gaming monitor is rare to find under $400
summary: LG's 27-inch glossy OLED gaming monitor is now on sale for $379.99. This deal marks a new lowest price for the 27GX704A-B model. The monitor features a WOLED panel and fast refresh rate.

headline: LG’s monitors come with an unwanted addition for Windows: McAfee pop-up ads
summary: LG UltraGear monitors are reportedly installing unwanted McAfee pop-up ads. Windows Update silently installs LG's Monitor App Installer upon connection. This occurs without user permission or notification on Windows 11.

headline: Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI
summary: Adobe's experimental Indigo camera app now features generative AI tools. Originally designed for a "natural look" in iPhone photography. The new AI capabilities do not rely on Adobe's Firefly models.

headline: Dr. Jill Lepore on why AI backlash is vital for the future
summary: Dr. Jill Lepore discusses her new book, "The Rise and Fall of the Artificial State." The Harvard professor argues that AI backlash is crucial for the future. Her book, exploring institutional patterns in history, releases August 25.

headline: Paramount and Warner Bros. Merger Paused for at Least 2 Weeks by Judge
summary: The proposed Paramount-Warner Bros. merger has been temporarily paused. A judge ordered the halt for at least two weeks. The merger is described as controversial.

headline: Best Buy's 2026 Black Friday in July Sale is Now Live
summary: Best Buy's Black Friday in July Sale for 2026 is now active. Shoppers can find early holiday deals. The sale offers significant discounts across categories.

headline: Rehaunted, a First-Person Psychological Horror Detective Game, Announced for PC
summary: "Rehaunted," a new first-person psychological horror detective game, is announced. Players investigate a strange house where clues feel "wrong." The game is set to release for PC.

headline: This LEGO Star Wars Set Is at Its New Lowest Price Ever Before It's Gone Forever
summary: A specific LEGO Star Wars set is available at its lowest price ever. This deal is offered before the set is discontinued. Collectors and fans should act quickly to acquire it.

headline: Faisal Islam: The new PM has big ideas - but what will they cost?
summary: Faisal Islam questions the cost of the new Prime Minister's big ideas. The country and markets are closely observing all decisions. Tricky trade-offs are expected as the PM implements policies.

headline: Burnham promises help with your money. How could it affect you?
summary: New PM Burnham pledges to help citizens with their finances. He plans to review income tax thresholds. Burnham acknowledged the difficulty of implementing such changes.

headline: Burnham's policy choices reveal what kind of PM he wants to be
summary: Prime Minister Burnham has begun outlining his key policy agenda. His initial focus includes a vow to end rough sleeping. These choices indicate the type of leader he aims to be.

headline: Watch: Starmer resigns, Burnham becomes PM... the day so far
summary: Andy Burnham has been appointed as the new UK Prime Minister. His appointment was confirmed by the King at Buckingham Palace. This follows the resignation of Starmer.
